items.name: Eliksni Captain - Helmet And Head
items.description:
"Fallen run in packs, led by an individual Captain. There is no denying a Captain's might; they are the fiercest of the Fallen. There is this sense of tattered nobility to them. You can see it in the way they carry themselves. They think they're better than us. They believe that Earth belongs to them."

items.name: Hyperion Aesir Power Armor's Right Shoulder
items.description:
Developed by the Hyperion Mining Inc to be used by their various private security and defense forces operating in dangerous environments. Although it is not uncommon to see these in mining colonies under going civil unrest.

Helmet: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/15535377315/
L Shoulder: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/15535403153/
R Shoulder: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/15535397210/
1.0 LC Armor: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/15535368805/

Note for LC Armor: You MUST be wearing the DEFAULT blocky body on an R15 avatar, and it will only appear in games that support R15 avatars.
